articles.title: US gives India assurance on access to AI technologies
articles.description: India has received assurances from the US that access to AI technologies will remain open, according to a top official. New Delhi believes the AI sector still requires innovation and is not yet ready for regulation. US officials expressed concerns about the potential impact and use of advanced AI models, seeking a review mechanism before their release.
